hero.title:
Trail running, nature and relaxation
in the heart of the Sierra Calderona.
hero.lead: A small-scale weekend for active people who want to experience more and perform less.

intro.title:
This weekend isn't about performing.
It's about experiencing.
paragraphs: For us, trail running isn't about speed or competition. It's about being outdoors, moving in nature, and noticing what happens once you step away from the rush of everyday life.

In the Sierra Calderona we run by feel. No strict schedule, no focus on times or performance. We stop where it's beautiful, look out over the valley, take a photo, or simply stand still in nature for a moment. Walking is always allowed, anywhere.
This weekend is for anyone with a reasonable base fitness and a healthy dose of curiosity — whether you've been running for years or have never set foot on a trail.

features.title: For beginners and go-getters alike
features.text: Specially designed for beginner trail runners and active hikers who want to discover nature. Everyone moves at their own level — there's always room to walk when needed.

features.title: A villa with pool & panorama
features.text: You don't stay in a hotel, but in an atmospheric villa surrounded by greenery — with a pool, spacious terrace and mountain views. The perfect place to fully unwind after a day on the trails.

features.title: Pine forests & rolling mountain trails
features.text: We run through breathtaking landscapes: fragrant pine forests, rolling mountain trails and surprising little paths you'd never find on your own. Every route has its own atmosphere and pace.

features.title: Views you won't forget any time soon
features.text: The highlight: your first confident trail run through the Spanish landscape. With viewpoints over ravines, valleys and rock formations that stay with you long after you're back home.

features.title: Sport, rest & good company
features.text: A perfect combination of physical challenge, relaxation and connection. After the runs: good food, good conversation, and time to really get to know each other — in a deliberately small group.

gallery.title: The feel of the weekend
gallery.text: Mountain trails, canyons, quiet resting spots and a villa to catch your breath — a glimpse of where you'll end up.

program.title: Three days, three routes
program.text: Each day has its own character — from a gentle start to the highlight of the weekend and a relaxed recovery loop to enjoy the afterglow.

days.label: Friday
days.name: Casinos Sunset Loop
days.text: A gentle start. We explore the trails around Casinos as the sun sets over the valley — perfect for getting used to the terrain and getting to know each other.

days.label: Saturday
days.name: Serra Calderona Grand Loop
days.text: The heart of the weekend: a longer route through breathtaking landscapes and past viewpoints you won't soon forget. Walking is always allowed.

days.label: Sunday
days.name: Rebalsadors Recovery Loop
days.text: A calmer finish along ravines and waterfalls, with plenty of time to soak it all in before heading home.

villa.title: Villa El Pinar, near Casinos
paragraphs: During this weekend you won't stay in a hotel, but in an atmospheric, detached villa that feels like a home away from home — in the quiet urbanisation of El Pinar, right next to the authentic village of Casinos.

The villa sits amid greenery with views over the mountains of the Sierra Calderona. After a day on the trails you unwind by the pool, on the terrace or in the garden. Inside, it's all about a warm, homely atmosphere: coffee in the morning, stories after the trail run, and healthy, wholesome meals without any rush.

host.title: Maurizio Salazar
paragraphs: I live at the foot of the Sierra Calderona for much of the year. By profession I'm a sports and shiatsu therapist, and I've been fascinated by movement, health and the power of nature my entire life.

Through my work I see every day how important it is to step out of your daily routine and make time for yourself. Nature has always been a place for me to recharge — and that sense of rest and freedom is what I love sharing with others.

That's why I organise small-scale trail running weekends. Not a performance-driven sports trip, but an accessible experience where movement, nature, relaxation and connection take centre stage. I'd love to take you into the mountains.

pricing.title: Choose your weekend
pricing.text: Both options are fully organised — from airport transfers to guidance on every run.

contact.title: Ready to head into the mountains?
contact.text: Send a message and we'll get back to you quickly — or contact us directly using the details below.
contact.location: Villa El Pinar, Casinos — Sierra Calderona, Spain
contact.reachability: Airport transfer included from Valencia Airport
